items.question: What services do you offer?
items.answer: I specialize in UI/UX design, brand identity, visual design, and digital product design.

items.question: How long does a typical project take?
items.answer: Depending on the scope, most projects take between 2-6 weeks from kickoff to final delivery.

items.question: Do you work with startups or established brands?
items.answer: Both! I love working with startups building from scratch and established brands looking to refresh.

items.question: What does your design process look like?
items.answer: I follow a structured process: discover & research, design & prototype, then refine & deliver. Collaboration is at the center of every step.
